Interface IClassifyFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Classify function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E5DA8515-3ACF-4C21-98F8-69A175CD1F41")]
public interface IClassifyFunctionArguments

Properties

AddedFrameWidth

Width of safety frame added around pixel block, in pixel. Optional. Default is 128.

int AddedFrameWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Sample Snippet

ClassifierDefinition

The trained classifier definition json object.

IJSONObject ClassifierDefinition { get; set; }

Property Value

IJSONObject

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassifierDefinitionFile

The trained classifier definition file.

string ClassifierDefinitionFile { get; set; }

string

Raster

The source raster object.

object Raster { get; set; }

object

Raster2

The second source raster object, optional.

object Raster2 { get; set; }
